relationships: kab:Ula d mary ur tezmir ara ad tṛuḥ ɣer Boston
kab:Tom ed mary la tturaren yiwen n wurar
kab:Ur yelli ara akk yessefk ad teg mary aya
kab:Ulac ccek dakken mary tḥemmel ismed-ines
kab:Tom yewwi-d adlis amaynut ɣef mary
kab:Melmi kan i d-telmed mary timussniwin timaynutin n tmeddurt ﹖
kab:D ayyuren aya seg wasmi ay la tessefray mary ad tessikel
